summary: Iteration 92 - Mobile App Shell Testing Complete. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend Agent Terrain Dashboard fully functional with MobileAppShell component: status bar, header, bottom tab navigation (Accueil, Planteurs, Inscrire, Chercher), KPI cards, alerts, registration form, and phone search. Farmer Dashboard correctly redirects non-farmer users (expected behavior).
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/health returns 200 with status=ok
PASS: GET /api/field-agent/dashboard returns 200 for admin user
PASS: GET /api/field-agent/dashboard has valid structure (cooperative_info, global_stats for admin view)
PASS: GET /api/field-agent/dashboard returns 403 without auth (protected endpoint)
PASS: GET /api/field-agent/my-farmers returns 200 with farmers list and total count
PASS: GET /api/field-agent/my-farmers returns 403 without auth
PASS: GET /api/agent/search?phone=xxx returns 200 with found boolean
PASS: GET /api/agent/search returns 400 for invalid phone format
PASS: GET /api/agent/search returns 422 when phone param missing
PASS: GET /api/agent/search returns 403 without auth
PASS: GET /api/field-agent/leaderboard returns 200 with leaderboard and period
PASS: GET /api/field-agent/my-visits returns 200 with visits list
PASS: GET /api/agent/sync/download returns 200 with farmers and sync_timestamp
PASS: GET /api/agent/sync/status returns 200 with total_synced_actions
PASS: GET /api/agent/dashboard/stats returns 200 with search stats
PASS: Frontend MobileAppShell component renders with data-testid='mobile-app-shell'
PASS: Frontend mobile header title shows 'Agent Terrain' with data-testid='mobile-header-title'
PASS: Frontend bottom tabs render with data-testid='mobile-bottom-tabs'
PASS: Frontend all 4 tabs found: dashboard, farmers, inscriptions, search
PASS: Frontend KPI cards container found with data-testid='kpi-cards'
PASS: Frontend refresh button found with data-testid='refresh-dashboard'
PASS: Frontend Planteurs tab clickable, farmer search input found
PASS: Frontend Inscrire tab shows registration form with all fields (name, phone, PIN, submit)
PASS: Frontend Chercher tab shows phone search form with input and button
PASS: Frontend Farmer Dashboard correctly redirects non-farmer users to homepage (expected behavior)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 92 verified the new mobile-first rewrite of Agent Terrain Dashboard using MobileAppShell component. Key features: 1) MobileAppShell provides phone-like container (max 430px, centered), status bar with time/wifi, header with title/subtitle/score badge, and bottom tab navigation. 2) Agent Terrain Dashboard has 4 tabs: Accueil (KPI cards, alerts), Planteurs (farmers list with search), Inscrire (registration form), Chercher (phone search). 3) All data-testids are properly implemented for testing. 4) Farmer Dashboard correctly redirects non-farmer users. 5) Backend APIs all working: /api/field-agent/dashboard, /api/field-agent/my-farmers, /api/agent/search, /api/field-agent/leaderboard, /api/field-agent/my-visits, /api/agent/sync/download, /api/agent/sync/status, /api/agent/dashboard/stats.

tabs.dashboard: KPI cards (Visites, Membres, Parcelles, Photos), alerts (Enfants identifiés, Mes planteurs), risk distribution, badges
tabs.farmers: Farmers list with search, farmer cards with completion progress
tabs.inscriptions: Registration form (nom, telephone, code coop, village, PIN, hectares), recent registrations list

backend_apis.GET /api/field-agent/dashboard: WORKING - returns agent stats or coop overview
backend_apis.GET /api/agent/sync/download: WORKING - downloads zone data for offline
